Fact: A Step can require the use of a Personal Protective Equipment, that is an equipment that the user can wear or hold, to be protected against risks.
In the context of a LOTO procedure, a Step can require the use of a padlock, that is a lock that prevents the accidental energisation and start-up of a machine which has been deactivated.
A machine is manufactured by one or more Agents.
A machine can be associated with a Machine Type and a Location (e.g. a Factory).
